message:
fix(writing/heroes): stop Scroll-to-Explore indicator from overlapping hero stat chips on mobile

Five recent article components (wills-estate, slack-migration,
overprompting, raptorq, barra-factor-model) share a hero-section pattern
where a "Scroll to Explore" label + gradient line is absolutely
positioned at `bottom-16 left-0 w-full` inside the hero `<section>`.

On desktop the section is tall enough that this indicator sits safely in
the empty space below the content. On narrow mobile viewports the stat
chips ("201 files · 17 subagents · 45 templates", "Tier 1 renter → Tier
5 industrialist", "Works at $500K or $500M", etc.) wrap to three stacked
rows, which grows the content block far enough down that it intersects
the absolutely-positioned indicator — the "SCROLL TO EXPLORE" text prints
directly on top of the last stat chip, rendering both illegible.

Make the indicator static (part of normal flow) on mobile and keep the
original absolute positioning only at `md` and above:

  -absolute bottom-16 left-0 w-full flex flex-col items-center gap-4 z-20 transition-opacity duration-500
  +mt-12 flex flex-col items-center gap-4 z-20 transition-opacity duration-500 md:absolute md:bottom-16 md:left-0 md:w-full md:mt-0

On mobile the indicator now sits as a normal block below the stat chips
with 48 px of breathing room; on `md+` viewports the layout is unchanged
(still absolutely pinned near the bottom edge of the hero).

Verified with a new Playwright spec (`tests/e2e/_diag-scroll-indicator.spec.ts`)
that renders each of the five articles at 375×800 and asserts
`scrollIndicator.top >= lastStatChip.bottom`, confirming the two blocks
no longer overlap.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -191,7 +191,7 @@ export function BarraArticle() {
         </EC>
 
         <div
-          className="absolute bottom-16 left-0 w-full flex flex-col items-center gap-4 z-20 transition-opacity duration-500"
+          className="mt-12 flex flex-col items-center gap-4 z-20 transition-opacity duration-500 md:absolute md:bottom-16 md:left-0 md:w-full md:mt-0"
           style={{ opacity: Math.max(0, 0.5 - scrollProgress * 5) }}
         >
           <span className="text-[11px] uppercase tracking-[0.4em] text-white/40 font-black">

@@ -222,7 +222,7 @@ export function RaptorQArticle() {
         </EC>
 
         <div
-          className="absolute bottom-16 left-0 w-full flex flex-col items-center gap-4 z-20 transition-opacity duration-500"
+          className="mt-12 flex flex-col items-center gap-4 z-20 transition-opacity duration-500 md:absolute md:bottom-16 md:left-0 md:w-full md:mt-0"
           style={{ opacity: Math.max(0, 0.5 - scrollProgress * 5) }}
         >
           <span className="text-[11px] uppercase tracking-[0.4em] text-white/40 font-black">
